name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages


  coordinator = 0;       (* coordinator ID *)
  messages = <<>>;       (* list of messages in transit *)



Init == /\ participants = <<1, 2, 3, 4, 5>>  (* Example with 5 participants *)
        /\ coordinator = 0
        /\ messages = <<>>

Next == \/ CoordinatorSendPrepare
      \/ ParticipantReceivePrepare
      \/ CoordinatorReceiveVotes
      \/ CoordinatorDecideCommit
      \/ CoordinatorDecideAbort
      \/ CoordinatorSendCommit
      \/ CoordinatorSendAbort
      \/ ParticipantReceiveCommit
      \/ ParticipantReceiveAbort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..5 |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..5 |-> 0]

Next == /\ forks' = forks
        /\ states' = states

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ r \in readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLE store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]

Next == /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>
